catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for SST_BAL_SST_L4_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_010_007_b and SST_BAL_SST_L3S_NRT_OBSERVATIONS_010_032, providing details on the product specifications, production system description, dataset information, processing information, catalogue updating, time averaging, file format, files nomenclature, references, and annexes.

product_line.name: Baltic Sea/North Sea SST Analysis Products
